ascii_renderer.c(3) Library Functions Manual ascii_renderer.c(3)

NAME

ascii_renderer.c - WASM ASCII renderer using libvterm, FreeType, and raylib.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct ascii_renderer_t

Functions


void ascii_renderer_init (int pixel_width, int pixel_height)
void ascii_renderer_render_frame (const char *ansi_data, size_t len)
void ascii_renderer_resize (int pixel_width, int pixel_height)
int ascii_renderer_get_cols (void)
int ascii_renderer_get_rows (void)
void ascii_renderer_shutdown (void)

Variables


const unsigned char g_font_default []
const unsigned int g_font_default_size

Detailed Description

WASM ASCII renderer using libvterm, FreeType, and raylib.

This module provides real-time ASCII art rendering for the web client. It uses:

  • libvterm for ANSI escape code parsing and terminal emulation
  • FreeType for glyph rasterization (using embedded DejaVu Sans Mono)
  • raylib for single-texture WebGL rendering

The render pipeline: ANSI string → libvterm cell grid → FreeType glyphs → RGB framebuffer → raylib texture → single WebGL draw call

Definition in file ascii_renderer.c.

Function Documentation

Get the current number of columns

Returns

Number of columns (terminal width)

Returns

void
  ascii_renderer_init (int pixel_width, int pixel_height)


Initialize the ASCII renderer with pixel dimensions


Parameters


pixel_width Canvas width in pixels


pixel_height Canvas height in pixels


Definition at line 111 of file ascii_renderer.c.


111                                                             {
112   if (renderer.vt) {
113     log_warn("ascii_renderer_init called but renderer already initialized");
114     return;
115   }
116 
117   renderer.width_px = pixel_width;
118   renderer.height_px = pixel_height;
119   renderer.pitch = ((pixel_width * 3 + 3) / 4) * 4; /* Align to 4 bytes */
120 
121   /* Allocate framebuffer */
122   renderer.framebuffer =
123       SAFE_MALLOC(renderer.pitch * pixel_height, uint8_t *);
124   if (!renderer.framebuffer) {
125     log_error("Failed to allocate framebuffer");
126     return;
127   }
128   memset(renderer.framebuffer, 0, renderer.pitch * pixel_height);
129 
130   /* Initialize FreeType */
131   if (FT_Init_FreeType(&renderer.ft_lib)) {
132     log_error("Failed to initialize FreeType");
133     SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
134     return;
135   }
136 
137   /* Load embedded DejaVu Sans Mono font */
138   if (FT_New_Memory_Face(renderer.ft_lib, g_font_default,
139                           (FT_Long)g_font_default_size, 0, &renderer.ft_face)) {
140     log_error("Failed to load default font");
141     FT_Done_FreeType(renderer.ft_lib);
142     SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
143     return;
144   }
145 
146   /* Set font size: 12pt at 96 DPI */
147   FT_Set_Char_Size(renderer.ft_face, 0, 12 * 64, 96, 96);
148 
149   /* Measure cell dimensions using 'M' */
150   FT_Load_Char(renderer.ft_face, 'M', FT_LOAD_RENDER);
151   renderer.cell_w = renderer.ft_face->glyph->advance.x >> 6;
152   renderer.cell_h = renderer.ft_face->glyph->bitmap.rows;
153   renderer.baseline = (3 * renderer.cell_h) / 4;
154 
155   /* Adjust height for 2:1 aspect ratio */
156   renderer.cell_h = renderer.cell_w * 2;
157 
158   renderer.cols = pixel_width / renderer.cell_w;
159   renderer.rows = pixel_height / renderer.cell_h;
160 
161   log_info("ASCII renderer initialized: %dx%d pixels, %dx%d cells, font size %dx%d",
162            pixel_width, pixel_height, renderer.cols, renderer.rows,
163            renderer.cell_w, renderer.cell_h);
164 
165   /* Initialize libvterm */
166   renderer.vt = vterm_new(renderer.rows, renderer.cols);
167   if (!renderer.vt) {
168     log_error("Failed to create VTerm");
169     FT_Done_Face(renderer.ft_face);
170     FT_Done_FreeType(renderer.ft_lib);
171     SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
172     return;
173   }
174 
175   renderer.vts = vterm_obtain_screen(renderer.vt);
176 
177   /* Note: raylib texture will be created on first render call (lazy init)
178    * This avoids hanging on GPU operations before WebGL context is ready.
179    * texture_initialized starts as false and is set after first LoadTextureFromImage. */
180 
181   log_info("ASCII renderer ready");
182 }






References g_font_default, g_font_default_size,
    log_error, log_info, log_warn, SAFE_FREE,
    SAFE_MALLOC, and ascii_renderer_t::width_px.






void
  ascii_renderer_render_frame (const char * ansi_data, size_t len)


Render an ANSI escape sequence frame


Parameters


ansi_data Pointer to ANSI string data


len Length of ANSI string in bytes


Definition at line 189 of file ascii_renderer.c.


189                                                                     {
190   if (!renderer.vt || !renderer.framebuffer) {
191     log_warn("ascii_renderer_render_frame: renderer not initialized");
192     return;
193   }
194 
195   /* Lazy-initialize raylib texture on first render
196    * This ensures WebGL context is ready before GPU operations */
197   if (!renderer.texture_initialized) {
198     Image img = {
199         .data = renderer.framebuffer,
200         .width = renderer.width_px,
201         .height = renderer.height_px,
202         .mipmaps = 1,
203         .format = PIXELFORMAT_UNCOMPRESSED_R8G8B8,
204     };
205     renderer.texture = LoadTextureFromImage(img);
206     renderer.texture_initialized = true;
207     log_debug("ascii_renderer: texture created on first render (lazy init)");
208   }
209 
210   /* Clear framebuffer to black */
211   memset(renderer.framebuffer, 0, renderer.pitch * renderer.height_px);
212 
213   /* Feed ANSI data to libvterm */
214   vterm_input_write(renderer.vt, ansi_data, len);
215 
216   /* Rasterize each cell */
217   for (int row = 0; row < renderer.rows; row++) {
218     for (int col = 0; col < renderer.cols; col++) {
219       VTermScreenCell cell;
220       vterm_screen_get_cell(renderer.vts, (VTermPos){.row = row, .col = col},
221                             &cell);
222 
223       int px = col * renderer.cell_w;
224       int py = row * renderer.cell_h;
225 
226       /* Extract colors from cell */
227       uint8_t fg_r = cell.fg.rgb.red;
228       uint8_t fg_g = cell.fg.rgb.green;
229       uint8_t fg_b = cell.fg.rgb.blue;
230       uint8_t bg_r = cell.bg.rgb.red;
231       uint8_t bg_g = cell.bg.rgb.green;
232       uint8_t bg_b = cell.bg.rgb.blue;
233 
234       /* Fill background */
235       fill_rect(renderer.framebuffer, renderer.pitch, px, py,
236                 renderer.cell_w, renderer.cell_h, bg_r, bg_g, bg_b);
237 
238       /* Render glyph - cell.chars[0] contains the Unicode codepoint */
239       uint32_t codepoint = cell.chars[0];
240       if (codepoint != 0 && codepoint != ' ') {
241         FT_UInt glyph_idx = FT_Get_Char_Index(renderer.ft_face, codepoint);
242         if (glyph_idx && !FT_Load_Glyph(renderer.ft_face, glyph_idx,
243                                         FT_LOAD_RENDER)) {
244           FT_GlyphSlot slot = renderer.ft_face->glyph;
245           int glyph_x = px + slot->bitmap_left;
246           int glyph_y = py + (renderer.baseline - slot->bitmap_top);
247 
248           blit_glyph(&slot->bitmap, glyph_x, glyph_y, fg_r, fg_g, fg_b,
249                       bg_r, bg_g, bg_b);
250         }
251       }
252     }
253   }
254 
255   /* Update raylib texture */
256   if (renderer.texture_initialized) {
257     UpdateTexture(renderer.texture, renderer.framebuffer);
258   }
259 
260   /* Render to canvas */
261   BeginDrawing();
262   ClearBackground(BLACK);
263   DrawTexture(renderer.texture, 0, 0, WHITE);
264   EndDrawing();
265 }






References log_debug, and log_warn.






void
  ascii_renderer_resize (int pixel_width, int pixel_height)


Resize the renderer to new pixel dimensions


Parameters


pixel_width New canvas width in pixels


pixel_height New canvas height in pixels


Definition at line 272 of file ascii_renderer.c.


272                                                               {
273   if (!renderer.vt || !renderer.framebuffer) {
274     log_warn("ascii_renderer_resize: renderer not initialized");
275     return;
276   }
277 
278   if (pixel_width == renderer.width_px && pixel_height == renderer.height_px) {
279     return;
280   }
281 
282   log_info("ascii_renderer_resize: %dx%d -> %dx%d", renderer.width_px,
283            renderer.height_px, pixel_width, pixel_height);
284 
285   /* Free old texture */
286   if (renderer.texture_initialized) {
287     UnloadTexture(renderer.texture);
288     renderer.texture_initialized = false;
289   }
290 
291   /* Reallocate framebuffer */
292   SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
293   renderer.width_px = pixel_width;
294   renderer.height_px = pixel_height;
295   renderer.pitch = ((pixel_width * 3 + 3) / 4) * 4;
296 
297   renderer.framebuffer =
298       SAFE_MALLOC(renderer.pitch * pixel_height, uint8_t *);
299   if (!renderer.framebuffer) {
300     log_error("Failed to reallocate framebuffer");
301     return;
302   }
303   memset(renderer.framebuffer, 0, renderer.pitch * pixel_height);
304 
305   /* Update terminal dimensions */
306   int new_cols = pixel_width / renderer.cell_w;
307   int new_rows = pixel_height / renderer.cell_h;
308 
309   if (new_cols != renderer.cols || new_rows != renderer.rows) {
310     renderer.cols = new_cols;
311     renderer.rows = new_rows;
312     vterm_set_size(renderer.vt, new_rows, new_cols);
313   }
314 
315   /* Create new texture */
316   Image img = {
317       .data = renderer.framebuffer,
318       .width = pixel_width,
319       .height = pixel_height,
320       .mipmaps = 1,
321       .format = PIXELFORMAT_UNCOMPRESSED_R8G8B8,
322   };
323   renderer.texture = LoadTextureFromImage(img);
324   renderer.texture_initialized = true;
325 
326   log_info("ascii_renderer_resize complete: %dx%d cells", renderer.cols,
327            renderer.rows);
328 }






References log_error, log_info, log_warn,
    SAFE_FREE, and SAFE_MALLOC.






void
  ascii_renderer_shutdown (void )


Shutdown the ASCII renderer and free resources


Definition at line 345 of file ascii_renderer.c.


345                                    {
346   if (renderer.texture_initialized) {
347     UnloadTexture(renderer.texture);
348     renderer.texture_initialized = false;
349   }
350 
351   if (renderer.vt) {
352     vterm_free(renderer.vt);
353     renderer.vt = NULL;
354   }
355 
356   if (renderer.ft_face) {
357     FT_Done_Face(renderer.ft_face);
358   }
359 
360   if (renderer.ft_lib) {
361     FT_Done_FreeType(renderer.ft_lib);
362   }
363 
364   if (renderer.framebuffer) {
365     SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
366   }
367 
368   memset(&renderer, 0, sizeof(renderer));
369   log_info("ASCII renderer shut down");
370 }






References log_info, and SAFE_FREE.
